zh.Maine, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易曼恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont於1085年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易曼恩時，他的父親Richard Ralph de Beaumont15歲，母親Mrs Richard Ralph de Beaumont16歲。他和Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.Maine, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche: 法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易曼恩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont于1085年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易曼恩时，他的父亲Richard Ralph de Beaumont15岁，母亲Mrs Richard Ralph de Beaumont16岁。他和Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Main  .
French: topographic name from Old French maine ‘dwelling, residence, abode’, or a habitational name from any of numerous places so named.

variants.name: Main
meanings: Scottish: from a shortened form of the Scandinavian personal name Magnus , which in Older Scots became Manus and Mane.
English (of Norman origin) and French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Ma(g)ino, Meino, from magan ‘strength, might’.
English (of Norman origin): nickname for a large man, from Old French magne, maine ‘great, big’.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Roscelin
meanings: A female name, found written Joscelyne and Jocelin, and by corruption Joscelind. A diminutive formed from Latin Justus. The German name Jost is rendered Joscelin.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont was born in 1085, in Maine, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Richard Ralph de Beaumont, was 15 and his mother, Mrs Richard Ralph de Beaumont, was 16. He had at least 1 son with Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont est né en 1085, à Maine, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Richard Ralph de Beaumont, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mrs Richard Ralph de Beaumont, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont 1085 in Maine, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Ralph de Beaumont 15 und seine Mutter Mrs Richard Ralph de Beaumont 16. Er hatte mit Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont è nato il nel 1085 nel Maine, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Richard Ralph de Beaumont, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Richard Ralph de Beaumont, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont.

ja.Maine, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche: フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーメイン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumontが1085年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーメインで生まれた時，父Richard Ralph de Beaumontは15歳，母Mrs Richard Ralph de Beaumontは16歳であった。彼はMrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumontとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont(이)가 1085년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 맹에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Ralph de Beaumont(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Richard Ralph de Beaumont(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont nasceu em 1085, em Maine, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Richard Ralph de Beaumont, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Richard Ralph de Beaumont, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont родился в 1085 г. в местности меин, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard Ralph de Beaumont было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Richard Ralph de Beaumont, 16. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont nació en 1085, en Maine, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Richard Ralph de Beaumont, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Mrs Richard Ralph de Beaumont, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont.
